metadata.title: New Year Goal-Setting & Planning
metadata.description: 30 regular trivia clues + 30 CAH-style clues about resolutions, goal-setting, and planning ahead

regular_clues.clue: The practice of setting objectives for the new year
The first month of the calendar year
The long-term desired state you work toward
Breaking a large goal into these smaller steps makes it manageable
The measurable standard to track progress toward a goal
Writing down your plans increases likelihood of achievement by this percentage
Time management tool dividing work into 25-minute intervals
Setting goals that are Specific, Measurable, Achievable, Relevant, and Time-bound
The failure to achieve a resolution by mid-January
The mental state of being fully concentrated on a goal
A strategy for staying consistent with habits
The delay between deciding something and actually starting it
The framework for identifying your values and life direction
Regular review of progress toward your goals
The ability to delay gratification for long-term success
A graph showing progress toward measurable goals over time
The strategy of identifying what you need to stop doing
A personal advisor or role model who guides your growth
The skill of planning how to handle obstacles in advance
Annual assessment of achievements and lessons learned
The practice of reflecting on your strengths and weaknesses
A budget allocated to personal development or new pursuits
The gap between where you are and where you want to be
A system using past data to predict future performance
The practice of scheduling time blocks for specific goals
The person or group who will be held accountable for goal progress
Adjusting goals when circumstances change unexpectedly
The long-term vision of the person you want to become
Scientific study showing that visualization improves goal achievement by what percentage?
The moment when you finally achieve your goal

cah_clues.clue: What most New Year's resolutions actually become by February
cah_clues.answer: What is a forgotten memo on your phone?

cah_clues.clue: The app you're going to pay $14.99/month for to finally become consistent with
cah_clues.answer: What is a fitness tracking app you'll unsubscribe from in March?

cah_clues.clue: What your therapist says you should do instead of setting impossible goals
cah_clues.answer: What is have realistic expectations and self-compassion?

cah_clues.clue: The LinkedIn post people make on January 1st at 5am full of motivational energy
cah_clues.answer: What is 'New year, new me, same problems'?

cah_clues.clue: What gym memberships spike by every January 2nd
cah_clues.answer: What is 200% while commitment lasts 3 weeks?

cah_clues.clue: The thing stopping you from achieving your goals despite buying every productivity app
cah_clues.answer: What is actually doing the work?

cah_clues.clue: This productivity guru's method got you to buy his $497 course you never finished
cah_clues.answer: What is David Allen's Getting Things Done?

cah_clues.clue: What your goal-setting spreadsheet looks like after two weeks
cah_clues.answer: What is an abandoned Google Sheet with no updates?

cah_clues.clue: The motivational poster technique that fails everyone by mid-February
cah_clues.answer: What is vision boards?

cah_clues.clue: What your goals need according to every productivity bro on TikTok
cah_clues.answer: What is 'measurable milestones' and 'accountability'?

cah_clues.clue: The app promising to build habits that you downloaded, used twice, then ghosted
cah_clues.answer: What is Habitica or Streaks?

cah_clues.clue: What happens when your goal-setting is too ambitious, too fast, too unrealistic
cah_clues.answer: What is spectacular failure and shame-eating?

cah_clues.clue: The one goal everyone sets that has a 92% failure rate by Valentine's Day
cah_clues.answer: What is losing weight or getting fit?

cah_clues.clue: What your Notion workspace looks like before life gets busy again
cah_clues.answer: What is a beautifully organized masterpiece you'll never touch?

cah_clues.clue: The thing you convince yourself about when you haven't met your goals
cah_clues.answer: What is 'goals are just suggestions anyway'?

cah_clues.clue: This productivity framework you'll Google obsessively then abandon by March
cah_clues.answer: What is SMART, OKRs, or goal-setting matrix?

cah_clues.clue: What your goals actually reflect about your self-esteem
cah_clues.answer: What is severe self-loathing and impossible standards?

cah_clues.clue: The person who actually achieves their New Year's goals
cah_clues.answer: What is someone with legitimate free time and no Netflix subscription?

cah_clues.clue: What derails your carefully planned goals faster than anything else
cah_clues.answer: What is literally anything unexpected happening?

cah_clues.clue: The planner you bought that has 47 unused pages by March
cah_clues.answer: What is a $40 minimalist goal-setting journal nobody writes in?

cah_clues.clue: What your goals need according to every self-help book written after 2010
cah_clues.answer: What is aggressive ambition and radical accountability?

cah_clues.clue: The energy level required to maintain New Year goals that most humans don't have
cah_clues.answer: What is unsustainable enthusiasm?

cah_clues.clue: This CEO's goal-setting formula got millions to subscribe to his podcast
cah_clues.answer: What is Elon Musk-style extreme goal-setting that nobody can achieve?

cah_clues.clue: What your bullet journal goal-tracking system becomes after week one
cah_clues.answer: What is a sad diary of broken promises?

cah_clues.clue: The LinkedIn CEO posting how they achieved all 47 goals while sleeping 4 hours a night
cah_clues.answer: What is lying, or possibly a psychopath?

cah_clues.clue: What happened to your last 4 years of New Year's resolutions
cah_clues.answer: What is they've been forgotten entirely?

cah_clues.clue: This productivity hack turns out to just be an excuse to avoid your actual goals
cah_clues.answer: What is researching productivity systems?

cah_clues.clue: The uncomfortable truth about people who actually achieve their goals
cah_clues.answer: What is they probably didn't set them in December drunk?

cah_clues.clue: What your goal to 'be more organized' actually costs you in time and stress
cah_clues.answer: What is way more than just living like a functional disaster?

cah_clues.clue: What you're going to tell yourself on January 2nd next year about this year's failures
cah_clues.answer: What is 'this year will be different' while making the same exact goals?
